title: Llama farm gamified
excerpt: Can we make Llama Farm more interactive? I’d love to see Llama farm evolve to where you have to keep your Llama’s alive by making constant updates. This would drive teams to follow the process and keep updates constant s…

posts.author: Knapp33 (Rachel Knapp)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we make Llama Farm more interactive? I’d love to see Llama farm evolve to where you have to keep your Llama’s alive by making constant updates. This would drive teams to follow the process and keep updates constant so that their Llamas stay alive. I think this would take Llama farm to the next level and make status updates more fun!
